subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath hearkened unto the Call and turned himself toward the Most Exalted Horizon, that Station wherein the Lote-Tree doth speak [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن سمع الندآء و اقبل الی الافق الاعلی المقام الذی فیه تنطق سدره
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @consolation and comfort
